payload.label: microwave
payload.long_description: Stainless-steel over-the-range microwave with a wide rectangular tinted glass door showing internal metal mesh and two interior lights, vertical right-side control panel with digital display and buttons; brushed metal surface with reflections and slight smudging, seen from about 0.8 meters away (frontal view, minor edge crop at image border).
